units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex database operations, essential for a hands-on learning path.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Learn to use sObjects, which are fundamental for interacting with Salesforce data programmatically in Apex, preparing for hands-on manipulation.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on hands-on DML operations, directly addressing the 'hands-on Apex' intent by teaching data modification.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Learn to write SOQL queries for retrieving data, a core hands-on Apex skill for interacting with the database.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit covers writing SOSL queries, providing another hands-on method for searching data within Apex, building on SOQL knowledge.
